'''鈭歯g-w-ch''' ('''ngawacha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hibernate|hibernate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-w-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hibernate|hibernate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-w-ch
|-
! Lemma
| ngawacha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngawachithi|ngawachithi]] || [[word:ngawachiji|ngawachiji]] || [[word:ngawachishi|ngawachishi]] || [[word:ngawachi|ngawachi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngawachuthuth|ngawachuthuth]] || [[word:ngawachujuj|ngawachujuj]] || [[word:ngawachushush|ngawachushush]] || [[word:ngawach|ngawach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngawachuthu|ngawachuthu]] || [[word:ngawachuju|ngawachuju]] || [[word:ngawachushu|ngawachushu]] || [[word:ngawachu|ngawachu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngawachufuth|ngawachufuth]] || [[word:ngawachufuj|ngawachufuj]] || [[word:ngawachufush|ngawachufush]] || [[word:ngawachuf|ngawachuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngawachethe|ngawachethe]] || [[word:ngawacheje|ngawacheje]] || [[word:ngawacheshe|ngawacheshe]] || [[word:ngawache|ngawache]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngawachothoth|ngawachothoth]] || [[word:ngawachojoj|ngawachojoj]] || [[word:ngawachoshosh|ngawachoshosh]] || [[word:ngawach|ngawach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngawachotho|ngawachotho]] || [[word:ngawachojo|ngawachojo]] || [[word:ngawachosho|ngawachosho]] || [[word:ngawacho|ngawacho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngawachofoth|ngawachofoth]] || [[word:ngawachofoj|ngawachofoj]] || [[word:ngawachofosh|ngawachofosh]] || [[word:ngawachof|ngawachof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngawach忙th忙|ngawach忙th忙]] || [[word:ngawach忙j忙|ngawach忙j忙]] || [[word:ngawach忙sh忙|ngawach忙sh忙]] || [[word:ngawach忙|ngawach忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngawachathath|ngawachathath]] || [[word:ngawachajaj|ngawachajaj]] || [[word:ngawachashash|ngawachashash]] || [[word:ngawach|ngawach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngawachatha|ngawachatha]] || [[word:ngawachaja|ngawachaja]] || [[word:ngawachasha|ngawachasha]] || [[word:ngawacha|ngawacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngawachafath|ngawachafath]] || [[word:ngawachafaj|ngawachafaj]] || [[word:ngawachafash|ngawachafash]] || [[word:ngawachaf|ngawachaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ngawachasha|ngawachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gongawachasha|gongawachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokingawachasha|gokingawachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngawachn眉sha|ngawachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gongawachnkn眉sha|gongawachnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokingawachn眉sha|gokingawachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngawachsh毛sha|ngawachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongawachnksh毛sha|gongawachnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingawachsh毛sha|gokingawachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngawachrosha|ngawachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongawachnkrosha|gongawachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingawachrosha|gokingawachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngawachmusha|ngawachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongawachnkmusha|gongawachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingawachmusha|gokingawachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ngawachsherasha|ngawachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gongawachnksherasha|gongawachnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokingawachsherasha|gokingawachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ngawachngasha|ngawachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gongawachnkngasha|gongawachnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokingawachngasha|gokingawachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngawachyasha|ngawachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongawachnkyasha|gongawachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokingawachyasha|gokingawachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ngawachyamasha|ngawachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gongawachnkyamasha|gongawachnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokingawachyamasha|gokingawachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngawachn眉sh毛sha|ngawachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongawachnkn眉sh毛sha|gongawachnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingawachn眉sh毛sha|gokingawachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngawachn眉rosha|ngawachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongawachnkn眉rosha|gongawachnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingawachn眉rosha|gokingawachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngawachn眉musha|ngawachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongawachnkn眉musha|gongawachnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingawachn眉musha|gokingawachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngawachsh毛n眉sha|ngawachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongawachnksh毛n眉sha|gongawachnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingawachsh毛n眉sha|gokingawachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngawachsh毛rosha|ngawachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongawachnksh毛rosha|gongawachnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingawachsh毛rosha|gokingawachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngawachsh毛musha|ngawachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongawachnksh毛musha|gongawachnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingawachsh毛musha|gokingawachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngawachron眉sha|ngawachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongawachnkron眉sha|gongawachnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingawachron眉sha|gokingawachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngawachrosh毛sha|ngawachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongawachnkrosh毛sha|gongawachnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingawachrosh毛sha|gokingawachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngawachromusha|ngawachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongawachnkromusha|gongawachnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingawachromusha|gokingawachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngawachmun眉sha|ngawachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongawachnkmun眉sha|gongawachnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingawachmun眉sha|gokingawachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngawachmush毛sha|ngawachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongawachnkmush毛sha|gongawachnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingawachmush毛sha|gokingawachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngawachmurosha|ngawachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongawachnkmurosha|gongawachnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingawachmurosha|gokingawachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ngawach|ngawach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ng忙w忙ch|ng忙w忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hongawach|hongawach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hong忙w忙ch|hong忙w忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongawach|hohongawach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohong忙w忙ch|hohong忙w忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉ngawach|n眉ngawach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ng忙w忙ch|n眉ng忙w忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ngawach|n眉n眉ngawach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ng忙w忙ch|n眉n眉ng忙w忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂ngawach|n茂ngawach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ng忙w忙ch|n茂ng忙w忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ngawach|n茂n茂ngawach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ng忙w忙ch|n茂n茂ng忙w忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lungawach|lungawach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lung忙w忙ch|lung忙w忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungawach|lulungawach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulung忙w忙ch|lulung忙w忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lingawach|lingawach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ling忙w忙ch|ling忙w忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingawach|lilingawach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liling忙w忙ch|liling忙w忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kongawach|kongawach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kong忙w忙ch|kong忙w忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongawach|kokongawach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokong忙w忙ch|kokong忙w忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kengawach|kengawach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keng忙w忙ch|keng忙w忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengawach|kekengawach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeng忙w忙ch|kekeng忙w忙ch]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
